{{Quote|Just a small dose of Merthian lung infection I picked up on Lockest IV.|Roark Garnet to Tax Inspector Mothra|<ref name="CP">''[[Star Wars Campaign Pack]]''</ref>}}
'''Lockest IV''' was a planet in the [[Lockest system/Legends|Lockest system]]. The system was located in the [[Palamut sector/Legends|Palamut sector]] of the [[Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> [[Roark Garnet/Legends|Roark Garnet]] once claimed to have contracted the [[Merthian lung infection]] while on Lockest IV to stop [[Tax Inspector]] [[Mothra]] from searching his [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. Mothra, a hypochondriac, hastily ended the inspection without searching the vessel.<ref name="CP" />
